positiveCases: User provides natural-language notes and profile facts are created.
User uploads a supported file and extracted facts are visible for confirmation.
User adds a public profile link and receives role-family and seniority recommendations.
negativeCases: Unsupported file type is rejected with plain recovery copy.
OCR or parsing failure preserves saved source metadata and offers a next-best action.
Thin profile does not unlock master resume generation.
Invalid AI output is rejected by schema validation.
regressionRisks: Source saved but facts are lost.
Internal extraction errors leak to the user.
Role recommendations use unconfirmed or invented facts.

positiveCases: Confirmed profile facts generate structured resume content.
Fact evidence status distinguishes confirmed, source-supported, inferred, conflicting, and missing-evidence claims.
PDF and DOCX artifacts are created from the ATS template.
Generated materials are private and ready only after validation.
negativeCases: Profile readiness failure asks for missing facts.
Inferred, conflicting, or missing-evidence facts become reviewer notes or confirmation questions, not hard resume claims.
AI schema failure blocks ready state and keeps recoverable content where safe.
PDF validation failure blocks download when text is missing, clipped, or unreadable.
regressionRisks: Resume invents credentials, dates, companies, or accomplishments.
Long source files under-weight role history.
PDF appears downloadable before validation succeeds.

positiveCases: Safe job URL is validated and ingested.
Job requirements are compared with confirmed profile facts.
Fit review explains match, gaps, risks, and practical recommendation.
negativeCases: Unsafe URL and SSRF-style input are blocked.
Unreadable job page asks the user to paste job text.
Profile-not-ready state routes the user back to profile enrichment.
regressionRisks: Private or local network URL is fetched.
Thin job text produces overconfident advice.
Fit review ignores known profile gaps.

positiveCases: User-approved job creates an application record.
Quota is consumed once and recorded in an audit-safe event.
Credit ledger records include an operation key for retry-safe paid work.
Tailored resume and cover letter artifacts are generated and validated.
negativeCases: Quota exceeded prevents application material generation.
Retry does not duplicate quota consumption.
Invalid AI output or PDF failure leaves a recoverable partial state.
regressionRisks: Quota event duplicates during retry.
Artifacts attach to the wrong user or application.
Application is marked ready after failed PDF validation.

positiveCases: User updates an application to each allowed status.
Status change creates or updates the audit trail.
Application history reflects the latest status.
negativeCases: Invalid status is rejected.
User cannot update another user's application.
Archived application behavior remains intentional and tested.
regressionRisks: Unauthorized status mutation succeeds.
Status labels diverge between UI and API.
Audit history is missing or overwritten.

workflows.journey: Owner/admin tier configuration and operating console
positiveCases: Owner views aggregate metrics.
Owner creates, edits, disables, or re-enables a tier.
Support-safe drill-downs are justified and audited.
negativeCases: Non-admin access is denied server-side and database-side.
Invalid tier limits are rejected.
Unsafe drill-down does not expose raw resume, cover letter, profile, or chat content.
regressionRisks: Non-admin receives aggregate metrics.
Tier changes bypass audit records.
Owner console leaks sensitive user content.

positiveCases: User creates a support ticket after L0 guidance.
L1 packet includes support-safe context and next action.
Owner execution deletes or minimizes eligible privacy-deletion records and records retained evidence.
Sensitive issues escalate to L2 with constraints.
negativeCases: Raw resume, chat transcript, prompts, and owner notes are excluded unless explicitly safe.
Sensitive identifiers are redacted.
User A cannot read or mutate User B profile sources, privacy requests, support issues, credits, or generated records.
Privacy, security, billing/refund, and account-access issues require human review.
regressionRisks: Owner-only fields appear in user-visible tickets.
Sensitive issue remains in autonomous support.
Raw personal data is stored in support metadata.
